name: Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, sauté the ground beef, onion, and green bell peppers until the beef is no longer pink.
2. Cook for about 5 minutes or until the meat is thoroughly cooked through.
3. Remove any excess fat from the skillet.
4. Stir in the tomato paste, horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, sugar, garlic powder, and water.
5. Heat the mixture through until all ingredients are well combined.
